items.title: Converge Bio raises $25M, backed by Bessemer and execs from Meta, OpenAI, Wiz
items.description: AI drug discovery startup Converge Bio raised $25 million in a Series A led by Bessemer Venture Partners, with additional backing from executives at Meta, OpenAI, and Wiz.
items.summary: AI drug discovery startup Converge Bio raised $25 million in a Series A led by Bessemer Venture Partners, with additional backing from executives at Meta, OpenAI, and Wiz.

items.title: Meta bought 1 GW of solar this week
items.description: The social media company inked three deals in the U.S. to power its data centers and offset its carbon footprint.
items.summary: The social media company inked three deals in the U.S. to power its data centers and offset its carbon footprint.

items.title: How one AI startup is helping rice farmers battle climate change
items.description: Mitti Labs is working with The Nature Conservancy to expand the use of climate-friendly rice farming practices in India. The startup uses its AI to verify reductions in methane emissions.
items.summary: Mitti Labs is working with The Nature Conservancy to expand the use of climate-friendly rice farming practices in India. The startup uses its AI to verify reductions in methane emissions.

items.title: Harvard dropouts to launch ‘always on’ AI smart glasses that listen and record every conversation
items.description: After developing a facial-recognition app for Meta’s Ray-Ban glasses and doxing random people, two former Harvard students are now launching a startup that makes smart glasses with an always-on microphone.

items.title: Meta to add 100MW of solar power from US gear
items.description: The social media company is adding another tranche of solar to power a new AI data center in South Carolina.
items.summary: The social media company is adding another tranche of solar to power a new AI data center in South Carolina.

items.title: Perplexity accused of scraping websites that explicitly blocked AI scraping
items.description: Internet giant Cloudflare says it detected Perplexity crawling and scraping websites, even after customers had added technical blocks telling Perplexity not to scrape their pages.
items.summary: Internet giant Cloudflare says it detected Perplexity crawling and scraping websites, even after customers had added technical blocks telling Perplexity not to scrape their pages.

items.title: Obvio’s stop sign cameras use AI to root out unsafe drivers
items.description: American streets are incredibly dangerous for pedestrians. A San Carlos, California-based startup called Obvio thinks it can change that by installing cameras at stop signs -- a solution the founders also say won’t create a panopticon.

items.title: Breakneck data center growth challenges Microsoft’s sustainability goals
items.description: Microsoft's sustainability goals are imperiled by its push into AI and cloud services.
items.summary: Microsoft's sustainability goals are imperiled by its push into AI and cloud services.

items.title: OpenAI’s “compromise” with the Pentagon is what Anthropic feared
items.description: On February 28, OpenAI announced it had reached a deal that will allow the US military to use its technologies in classified settings. items.title: MIT Technology Review is a 2026 ASME finalist in reporting
items.description: The American Society of Magazine Editors has named MIT Technology Review as a finalist for a 2026 National Magazine Award in the reporting category. items.description: Burrowed in the alleys of Hongik-dong, a hushed residential neighborhood in eastern Seoul, is a faded stone-tiled building stamped “Korea Baduk Association,” the governing body for professional Go. items.title: Finding value with AI and Industry 5.0 transformation
items.description: For years, Industry 4.0 transformation has centered on the convergence of intelligent technologies like AI, cloud, the internet of things, robotics, and digital twins. Industry 5.0 marks a pivotal shift from integrating emerging technologies to orchestrating them at scale. items.title: What Is That Mysterious Metallic Device US Chief Design Officer Joe Gebbia Is Using?
items.description: Gebbia was reportedly spotted at a San Francisco coffee shop using an unidentified pair of earbuds with a circular disc that looks similar to the device seen in a recent OpenAI hoax ad.
items.summary: Gebbia was reportedly spotted at a San Francisco coffee shop using an unidentified pair of earbuds with a circular disc that looks similar to the device seen in a recent OpenAI hoax ad.

items.title: This AI Agent Is Ready to Serve, Mid-Phone Call
items.description: Deutsche Telekom, the German cell provider—which holds a majority stake in T-Mobile—is partnering with ElevenLabs to enable an AI assistant on all of its network’s calls in Germany. No app required.
items.summary: Deutsche Telekom, the German cell provider—which holds a majority stake in T-Mobile—is partnering with ElevenLabs to enable an AI assistant on all of its network’s calls in Germany. No app required.

items.title: The Data Centers Have Arrived at the Edge of the Arctic Circle
items.description: As AI labs gorge themselves on compute, data center operators have headed north in search of cheap and plentiful energy.
items.summary: As AI labs gorge themselves on compute, data center operators have headed north in search of cheap and plentiful energy.

items.title: Anthropic Hits Back After US Military Labels It a ‘Supply Chain Risk’
items.description: Anthropic says it would be “legally unsound” for the Pentagon to blacklist its technology after talks over military use of its artificial intelligence models broke down.
items.summary: Anthropic says it would be “legally unsound” for the Pentagon to blacklist its technology after talks over military use of its artificial intelligence models broke down.

items.title: Trump Moves to Ban Anthropic From the US Government
items.description: President Donald Trump’s sudden order comes after the Defense Department pressured Anthropic to drop restrictions on how its AI can be used by the military.
items.summary: President Donald Trump’s sudden order comes after the Defense Department pressured Anthropic to drop restrictions on how its AI can be used by the military.

items.title: OpenAI Fires an Employee for Prediction Market Insider Trading
items.description: Prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi are big business, and some Big Tech employees are testing boundaries by making trades based on insider knowledge.
items.summary: Prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi are big business, and some Big Tech employees are testing boundaries by making trades based on insider knowledge.

items.title: Wall Street Has AI Psychosis
items.description: A “thought experiment” about the impacts of AI sent stocks tumbling earlier this week. It’s probably going to keep happening.
items.summary: A “thought experiment” about the impacts of AI sent stocks tumbling earlier this week. It’s probably going to keep happening.

items.title: Huxe Will Give You a Personalized, Daily Audio Summary Powered by AI
items.description: The app reads your email inbox and your meeting calendar, then gives you a short audio summary. It can help you spend less time scrolling, but of course, there are privacy drawbacks to consider.
items.summary: The app reads your email inbox and your meeting calendar, then gives you a short audio summary. It can help you spend less time scrolling, but of course, there are privacy drawbacks to consider.
